data.title: SEC Chairman: The Crypto Safe Harbor proposal has been submitted to the White House for review and would allow crypto projects to raise funds without immediate registration.
data.description: U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission Chairman Paul Atkins stated that the crypto "safe harbor" proposal has entered the White House review stage, and formal rules are expected to be released soon. The proposal includes a "startup exemption" mechanism, allowing crypto projects to raise funds without immediately completing registration.

data.title: Argentine president's claim of no connection to LIBRA project has been questioned after reports surfaced of phone conversations with project staff.
data.description: Argentine President Miguel Millais has seven recorded phone calls with businessman Mauricio Novelli on the evening of February 14, 2025, the launch of the LIBRA project. These calls spanned the period before and after Novelli posted promotional content on the X platform. The report also states that the latest phone evidence includes recordings of what appear to be payments and draft documents outlining financial arrangements, further casting doubt on his previous statements that he had no connection to the project. Millais has not yet been formally charged, but he has become a key target of the investigation. (The New York Times)

data.title: Anthropic plans to invest $200 million in a new private equity project.
data.description: Anthropic is planning to invest approximately $200 million in a new private equity partnership aimed at providing AI tools to its portfolio companies. Sources familiar with the matter said that institutions such as General Atlantic, Blackstone, and Hellman & Friedman are considering participating in the project, with an overall funding target of approximately $1 billion. This move is seen as a key step in Anthropic's expansion into enterprise-level AI services. (Wall Street Journal)

data.title: An account with nearly $4 million in profit purchased $130,000 worth of NBA regular season game points spread game between the Trail Blazers and the Nuggets.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, an account (address: 0xc2e7800b5af46e6093872b177b7a5e7f0563be51) that profited nearly $4 million in the Polymarket "NBA Regular Season Trail Blazers vs. Nuggets" prediction event purchased 130,000 shares of the prediction that the Trail Blazers would defeat the Nuggets, with an average opening price of 26.6¢. The NBA regular season game between the Trail Blazers and the Nuggets will start at 9:00 AM Beijing time today. The NBA regular season is currently nearing its end. The Trail Blazers have a record of 40 wins and 38 losses, ranking 9th in the Western Conference; the Nuggets have a record of 50 wins and 28 losses, ranking 4th in the Western Conference. Odaily Seer continuously monitors the prediction market, seeing changes before prices are set.

data.title: Pentagon Cancels Scheduled Press Conference Without Explanation
data.description: The Pentagon has unexpectedly canceled a scheduled press conference that was set for Tuesday morning at 8 a.m. local time. According to BlockBeats, no reason was provided for the cancellation.

data.title: High Stakes in NCAA Final as Michigan Faces Connecticut
data.description:
A significant bet has been placed on the outcome of the NCAA final between Michigan and Connecticut. According to Odaily, an account with a 65.5% success rate has invested $980,000 on Michigan's victory over Connecticut, with an average opening price of 74¢.

The NCAA final is set to begin today at 8:50 PM UTC+8. Michigan, the top seed from the Big Ten Conference, advanced to the final after a decisive win over Arizona in the semifinals. Connecticut, the top seed from the Big East Conference, has reached the NCAA final three times in the past four years, winning twice, and is aiming for a third championship in four years.

Currently, on Polymarket, the probability of Michigan winning stands at 74%, while Connecticut's chances are at 27%.

data.title: An account with a winning percentage over 65% was purchased for $980,000 and Michigan won the NCAA Finals.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, in the Polymarket "NCAA Finals (Michigan vs. Connecticut)" prediction event, an account with a 65.5% winning percentage (address: 0x2b3ff45c91540e46fae1e0c72f61f4b049453446) purchased $980,000 worth of bets on Michigan defeating Connecticut, with an average opening price of 74¢. The NCAA Finals will officially begin at 8:50 AM today. Michigan is the top seed in the Big Ten Conference and defeated Arizona by a large margin in the semifinals. Connecticut is the top seed in the Big East Conference and has reached the NCAA Finals three times in the past four years, winning twice. This year, they will be aiming for a "three-peat" in four years. Currently, the probability of Michigan winning the championship on Polymarket is reported as 74%, and the probability of Connecticut winning is reported as 27%. Odaily Seer continues to monitor the prediction market, seeing changes before prices are set.

data.title: Saudi Arabia’s large petrochemical facilities reportedly suffered widespread attacks
data.description: Early on the morning of the 7th local time, Iranian sources, citing unnamed sources, reported that an explosion occurred in the Jubail industrial zone in northeastern Saudi Arabia, which has US investment, and that the attack was widespread. The Jubail industrial zone is reportedly one of the world's major petrochemical production bases, with an annual output of approximately 60 million tons of petrochemical products, accounting for 6% to 8% of global production. Several large petrochemical companies and projects are located in the zone. Saudi Basic Industries Corporation (SAB) is one of the major investors in the industrial zone. In addition, the Sadara project, in which Dow Chemical Company is involved, and a project jointly invested by Saudi Aramco and Total Energy are also located in the industrial zone. (CCTV)

data.title: The Blockchain Association opposes Citadel's regulatory proposals for DeFi and supports the SEC's innovation exemption framework.
data.description: The Blockchain Association has submitted a comment letter to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) in response to Citadel's previous calls for stronger regulation of DeFi. The Blockchain Association stated that DeFi protocol developers are not brokers or exchange operators and therefore cannot be included in the regulatory framework designed for traditional financial intermediaries. The organization also called on the SEC to advance an "innovation exemption" mechanism to provide regulatory pilot space for on-chain assets and tokenized securities, pointing out that comprehensive rule-making processes are lengthy and could delay technology adoption and encourage the outflow of innovation. Previously, Citadel had recommended that the SEC strengthen its regulation of DeFi through formal legislative processes. (The Block)

data.title: An account that had lost nearly $5 million purchased $400,000 worth of NCAA Major Madness Finals units, with Connecticut defeating Michigan by a point spread.
data.description: Odaily Seer's monitoring shows that in the Polymarket "NCAA Finals: Connecticut vs. Michigan" prediction event, an account that lost nearly $5 million (address: 0x492442eab586f242b53bda933fd5de859c8a3782) purchased $400,000 worth of bets on Connecticut to win by a 6.5-point spread against Michigan, with an average opening price of 49¢. NCAA "March Madness" refers to the national championship of the NCAA Division I men's basketball league. The tournament typically begins in March each year, uses a single-elimination format, and is known for its intense competition and packed schedule. Odaily Seer continuously monitors the prediction market, seeing changes before prices are priced in.

data.title: Polymarket Account Takes $400,000 Bet on Connecticut in NCAA Final
data.description: A Polymarket account, which has previously incurred losses nearing $5 million, has placed a $400,000 wager on Connecticut to win by more than 6.5 points in the NCAA final. According to NS3.AI, this position was established at an average price of 49 cents, betting against Michigan.

data.title: Polymarket Sees Significant Bet on NCAA March Madness Outcome
data.description:
A notable transaction has occurred in the Polymarket prediction market concerning the NCAA March Madness event. According to Odaily, an account with a significant loss of nearly $5 million has invested $400,000 on Connecticut to win against Michigan with a 6.5-point spread, at an average opening price of 49 cents.

The NCAA March Madness refers to the national championship of the NCAA Division I men's basketball tournament. This event typically begins in March, featuring a single-elimination format that is known for its intense competition and tightly packed schedule.

data.title: Explosion Reported in Saudi Arabia's Jubail Industrial City
data.description:
An explosion occurred in Saudi Arabia's Jubail Industrial City, according to reports from unnamed sources on April 7. According to BlockBeats, the incident took place in the early hours of the day and involved U.S. capital participation. Jubail Industrial City is a significant global petrochemical production hub, with an annual output of approximately 60 million tons, accounting for 6% to 8% of the world's total production. The area hosts numerous large petrochemical enterprises and projects, with the Saudi Basic Industries Corporation being one of the primary investors.

Additionally, the Sadara project, involving the U.S. Dow Chemical Company, and a joint venture between Saudi Aramco and France's TotalEnergies, are also located within the industrial city.

data.title: Whale Alert: Significant USDC Withdrawal from Aave
data.description: An anonymous address has withdrawn 102.62 million USDC from Aave, according to Whale Alert data. This substantial movement of funds highlights ongoing activity within the cryptocurrency market, raising questions about potential impacts on liquidity and market dynamics.

data.title: Binance Replenishes Bitcoin Learn & Earn Rewards for April 2026
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the Bitcoin Learn & Earn rewards have been replenished for April 2026. New users who registered on Binance after April 1, 2026, at 00:00 (UTC) are eligible to participate in this educational initiative. By completing the Learn & Earn quiz with all correct answers, participants can earn 0.00001 BTC in token vouchers. The rewards are available to the first 5,000 new users each month on a first-come, first-served basis.

To participate, eligible users must complete the quiz and can only claim one reward. Once all rewards are distributed, participation will close for that month. Binance plans to renew the rewards monthly, and users are encouraged to stay updated through official announcements. The activity aims to educate users on Bitcoin, providing a foundational understanding of the cryptocurrency. Participants must complete KYC to receive rewards, and accounts registered in bulk or as sub-accounts are not eligible. Rewards will be distributed within 48 hours to those who pass the quiz, and the token voucher is valid for 14 days from distribution.

Binance reserves the right to disqualify participants who tamper with the program or interfere with its operation. The company also retains the right to terminate the activity without prior notice and to interpret the activity's terms. Users are reminded that Binance accounts should only be used by the registrants, and the company may suspend or cancel accounts used by others. The terms and conditions of the promotion are subject to change at Binance's discretion.

data.title: Solana Foundation Enhances Security Measures with New Initiatives
data.description:
On April 7, the Solana Foundation announced the launch of several security enhancement initiatives. According to BlockBeats, these measures include the STRIDE security assessment and monitoring system, led by Asymmetric Research, and the SIRN response network for handling security incidents.

STRIDE will conduct independent evaluations of ecosystem protocols, offering ongoing operational security and proactive threat monitoring. It will also provide formal verification support for projects with a total value locked (TVL) exceeding $100 million. Meanwhile, SIRN, composed of multiple security agencies and research teams, will facilitate real-time security incident response.

data.title: Uniswap API Gains Significant Share in MetaMask's Swap Transactions
data.description: On April 7, Uniswap founder Hayden Adams announced that the Uniswap API has captured approximately 40% of swap transactions within MetaMask's aggregation trading routing system, following its integration a month ago. According to BlockBeats, Adams also noted that Uniswap has made its API key freely available to all developers.

data.title: U.S. House Democrats to Impeach Defense Secretary Over Iran Conflict
data.description: U.S. House Democrats have announced plans to impeach Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth over issues related to the Iran conflict. According to BlockBeats, this move marks a significant political development as tensions continue to rise over U.S. military involvement in the region. The decision reflects growing concerns among lawmakers about the administration's handling of the situation.

data.title: STOCKS | Huatai Securities Highlights A-Share Strategy Amid Middle East Tensions
data.description:
Huatai Securities has released its A-share strategy, noting that the market continued to experience volatility last week due to fluctuating Middle East tensions and pre-Qingming Festival risk aversion. According to Jin10, the tracked A-share sentiment index remains in the 'panic' range. Structurally, sectors benefiting from geopolitical factors and high oil prices, such as power, new energy, and coal, faced profit-taking due to high crowding levels. Meanwhile, sectors with low correlation, like telecommunications and innovative pharmaceuticals, performed well, with earnings season exceeding expectations becoming a new trading cue.

The current odds for left-side positioning may gradually increase, but it is advised not to make unilateral bets until geopolitical situations become clearer. It is recommended to continue waiting for right-side signals. Additionally, despite the unexpected non-farm payroll data, caution is advised regarding the risk chain of rising oil prices leading to inflation and liquidity tightening.

In terms of asset allocation, it is suggested to control positions and leave room for maneuver. In the short term, maintain a defensive stance and allocate assets with low correlation, such as dividends, AI computing power, and innovative pharmaceuticals. In the medium term, focus on low-entry opportunities around the power chain and prosperity clues.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Samsung Electronics Expects Over Eightfold Increase in Q1 Operating Profit
data.description: Samsung Electronics announced on April 7 that it anticipates its first-quarter operating profit to grow more than eightfold compared to the same period last year, surpassing institutional expectations. According to Jin10, the surge in artificial intelligence infrastructure has led to supply bottlenecks, driving up chip prices. The world's largest memory chip manufacturer forecasts an operating profit of 57.2 trillion Korean won (approximately $37.92 billion) for the January to March period, compared to 6.69 trillion won in the previous year, exceeding the institutional forecast of 40.6 trillion won.
